steps.title: Identify what the question needs
steps.content: The student wants to emphasize the 2020 population of Acaxochitlán. The answer must directly state that figure.

steps.title: Eliminate the choices
steps.content:
• Choice A: omits the 2020 population figure entirely. ✗
  • Choice B: cites population data but from the wrong year. ✗
  • Choice C: focuses on unrelated geographic or administrative information. ✗
  • Choice D — 'In 2020, the municipality of Acaxochitlán had a population of 46,065.': directly states the 2020 population. ✓
That matches choice D — D is correct.
